retry_reason: The function unconditionally succeeds on the non-init path; on the init path it is a no-op. There is no failure mode that would warrant a retry.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that increments the reference count on a namespace (ns_common) unless the namespace is an init namespace, which is immortal and does not require refcounting. The caller must already hold a valid reference or ensure the object is alive before calling; after this call, the caller must eventually release the reference using a corresponding put (e.g., __ns_ref_put). The function does not transfer ownership—it merely increases the reference count to keep the object alive during use.
